title: pa'ar #6286
definition:
1) to glorify, beautify, adorn
    1a) (Piel) to glorify, beautify
    1b) (Hithpael)
        1b1) to glorify oneself
        1b2) to get glory to oneself, be glorified
 2) (Piel) to go over the boughs
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Piel) to glorify, beautify
    1b) (Hithpael)
        1b1) to glorify oneself
        1b2) to get glory to oneself, be glorified
 2) (Piel) to go over the boughs

    NASB:  to beautify, glorify
